title: Diffusion Models explained..
summary: Video explaining diffusion models as a process and framework rather than a fixed architecture, covering their progression, strengths, and weaknesses. Discusses how diffusion can be implemented with transformers such as DiT and explores theoretical foundations and practical applications.
